title: Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

overview.short: Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary (popular as Deer Park) was established in 1977.
overview.description: Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary (popular as Deer Park) was established in 1977. This wooded area is located near Bolpur Santiniketan in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum District in the Indian state of West Bengal.

nearestAirport.name: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Surul
topPlaces.description: Surul is a census town in Bolpur Sriniketan CD block in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Museum of Santal Culture
topPlaces.description: The Museum of Santal Culture (Santali: ᱥᱟᱱᱛᱟᱞ ᱟᱹᱨᱤᱪᱟᱹᱞᱤ ᱫᱚᱦᱚ ᱡᱚᱜᱟᱣ ᱵᱟᱠᱷᱚᱞ) is a private community museum located in the village of Bishnubati, West Bengal. The community-led museum documents the history of the Santal community largely prevalent in the region, which includes their past, their memories, and traditional ways of being.

topPlaces.name: Palli Samgathana Vibhaga
topPlaces.description: Palli Samgathana Vibhaga (Institute of Rural Reconstruction), of Visva-Bharati University, was established at Sriniketan in 1922, by the Nobel laureate Rabindranath Tagore. Leonard Knight Elmhirst was its first director.

topPlaces.name: Sriniketan
topPlaces.description: Sriniketan (also spelt Sri Niketan) is a neighbourhood of Surul in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is adjacent to Santiniketan and houses the second campus of Visva-Bharati University.

topPlaces.name: Binuria
topPlaces.description: Binuria is a village in Birbhum district in the state of West Bengal, India. It is about 150 kilometers far away from Kolkata but only 6 kilometers away from our well known Santiniketan as well as Visva-Bharati University founded by Rabindranath Tagore.

topPlaces.name: Shantiniketan
topPlaces.description: Shantiniketan (IPA: [ʃantiniketɔn]) is a neighbourhood of Bolpur town in the Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in West Bengal, India, approximately 152 km north of Kolkata. It was established by Debendranath Tagore, and later expanded by his son, Rabindranath Tagore whose vision became what is now a university town with the creation of Visva-Bharati.

topPlaces.name: Sangit Bhavana
topPlaces.description: Sangit Bhavana (Institute of Dance, Drama and Music), of Visva-Bharati University, Santiniketan, started functioning as a part of Kala Bhavana in 1919 and as a separate institution in 1933. It was established by the Nobel laureate Rabindranath Tagore.

topPlaces.name: Rolf Schoembs Vidyashram
topPlaces.description: Rolf Schoembs Vidyashram (commonly known as RSV) is a non-formal primary school located in Ghosaldanga, near Bishnubati village in the Bolpur-Sriniketan area of Birbhum district, West Bengal, India. It was founded in 1996 by the Ghosaldanga Bishnubati Adibasi Seva Sangha with financial support from Rolf Schoembs, a German friend of the Santal community.

items.note: Surul is a census town in Bolpur Sriniketan CD block in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

The Museum of Santal Culture (Santali: ᱥᱟᱱᱛᱟᱞ ᱟᱹᱨᱤᱪᱟᱹᱞᱤ ᱫᱚᱦᱚ ᱡᱚᱜᱟᱣ ᱵᱟᱠᱷᱚᱞ) is a private community museum located in the village of Bishnubati, West Bengal. The community-led museum documents the history of the Santal community largely prevalent in the region, which includes their past, their memories, and traditional ways of being.

Palli Samgathana Vibhaga (Institute of Rural Reconstruction), of Visva-Bharati University, was established at Sriniketan in 1922, by the Nobel laureate Rabindranath Tagore. Leonard Knight Elmhirst was its first director.

Sriniketan (also spelt Sri Niketan) is a neighbourhood of Surul in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is adjacent to Santiniketan and houses the second campus of Visva-Bharati University.

Binuria is a village in Birbhum district in the state of West Bengal, India. It is about 150 kilometers far away from Kolkata but only 6 kilometers away from our well known Santiniketan as well as Visva-Bharati University founded by Rabindranath Tagore.

Shantiniketan (IPA: [ʃantiniketɔn]) is a neighbourhood of Bolpur town in the Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in West Bengal, India, approximately 152 km north of Kolkata. It was established by Debendranath Tagore, and later expanded by his son, Rabindranath Tagore whose vision became what is now a university town with the creation of Visva-Bharati.

Sangit Bhavana (Institute of Dance, Drama and Music), of Visva-Bharati University, Santiniketan, started functioning as a part of Kala Bhavana in 1919 and as a separate institution in 1933. It was established by the Nobel laureate Rabindranath Tagore.

Rolf Schoembs Vidyashram (commonly known as RSV) is a non-formal primary school located in Ghosaldanga, near Bishnubati village in the Bolpur-Sriniketan area of Birbhum district, West Bengal, India. It was founded in 1996 by the Ghosaldanga Bishnubati Adibasi Seva Sangha with financial support from Rolf Schoembs, a German friend of the Santal community.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (140 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (125 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ballabhpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Surul, Museum of Santal Culture, Palli Samgathana Vibhaga, Sriniketan, Binuria.
